title: Xtra Crunchy Ukrainian Chickpeas Tagine
description: Garlicky, crunchy, post-workout vegetarian dish featuring mustard and pickles, served in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Heat olive oil in ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, julienned carrot, sliced celery, and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add drained chickpeas, sliced pickles, and vegetable broth to the tagine, then bring to a gentle simmer.
Stir in Dijon mustard and season with salt and pepper, let the mixture simmer uncovered for 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Increase heat to medium-high and cook for an additional 5 minutes, letting the liquid reduce and develop a thicker coating on the chickpeas.
Taste, adjust seasoning if needed, then transfer the tagine to a preheated oven at 200°C for 10 minutes to crisp the top layer.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh parsley, and enjoy the crunchy, garlicky post-workout dish.
